     The Numbers Business Report

Fantastic Four (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $154,696,080Details
International Box Office $178,436,670
Worldwide Box Office $333,132,750
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Scientist Reed Richards persuades his arrogant former classmate, Victor von Doom to fund his experiments with cosmic energy. On von Doom’s space station, the crew — including astronaut Ben Grimm, researcher Sue Storm and pilot Johnny Storm — are exposed to a mysterious cosmic storm that bestows super powers upon them. As they cope with their transformations, von Doom vows his revenge.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$56,061,504 (36.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$87,500,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,602 opening theaters/3,619 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $272,950,484

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 8th, 2005 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 8th, 2005 (Wide), released as Fantastic 4 (Australia)
Video Release: December 6th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of intense action, and some suggestive content.
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Fantastic Four
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Visual Effects
Plot point: Friends turned Enemies, Origin Story, Revenge
Social setting: Space Program
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Constantin Film, Marvel Studios, 1492 Pictures, Bernd Eichinger
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Scientist Reed Richards persuades his arrogant former classmate, Victor von Doom to fund his experiments with cosmic energy. On von Doom’s space station, the crew — including astronaut Ben Grimm, researcher Sue Storm and pilot Johnny Storm — are exposed to a mysterious cosmic storm that bestows super powers upon them. As they cope with their transformations, von Doom vows his revenge.
